variantConfig.label: Site
Document library
Folder

tools.name: list_folder
tools.description: List files and folders inside the connected SharePoint folder.

tools.name: browse_folder
tools.description: List files and folders inside a sub-folder by item ID. Use list_folder first to discover sub-folder IDs.

tools.name: get_drive_item_meta
tools.description: Get metadata for a file or folder by item ID.

tools.name: search_files
tools.description: Search files within the connected document library. KQL syntax is supported.

tools.name: read_file_content
tools.description: Read a file's contents. Provide the file item ID. Use list_folder or search_files to discover file IDs.

tools.name: create_folder
tools.description: Create a new sub-folder inside the connected folder. Omit parentItemId to create directly inside the connected folder.

tools.name: move_drive_item
tools.description: Move a file or folder to a different parent folder within the document library.

tools.name: delete_drive_item
tools.description: Delete a file or folder by item ID.
